text.tspan: This book shows parents of curious children aged 7
to 13 how to make science practice calm, practical,
and confidence-building at home. It replaces vague
inspiration with a concrete structure that makes the
reader feel more prepared, more credible, and more
Lena Park helps specialized operators turn hard-won experience into
clear offers, teachable systems, and premium client trust.

svg.text: Bright premium education cover with tactile shapes and optimistic room to breathe.
